human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for lodging-specific revenue boundary discipline, folio reconciliation, rate and package evidence handling, night-audit tax and posting exceptions, payment dispute posture, fraud and safety escalation, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.
validated evidence is limited to the spec pack; runtime strategy remains specification-based until a separate trusted build is committed.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to lodging revenue source tracing, folio reconciliation, night-audit exception support, financial readiness summaries, and escalation packaging.

Authority sources cover short-term lodging fee disclosure, ADA lodging reservation constraints, credit-card billing-error handling, financial recordkeeping, lodging tax, lodging accounting terminology, payment-card security, and identity-theft red flags with refresh and decay rules.

Scenario set covers source-record mismatches, missing documentation, unsupported financial treatment, high-volume audit execution, customer exception handling, adjacent-lane rejection, low-confidence prerequisites, source conflicts, and tenant adaptation.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdictional tax, PMS configuration, rate authority, booking-channel, processor, and tenant-policy differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated specification-based operations.
